metadata.description: Wargame unit library V3 — 50 units, 10 categories. Clean schema focused on functional game logic.
metadata.transport_note: Units with transport_dependent:true cannot redeploy strategically without a TRANSPORT or MARITIME_CARGO asset.
metadata.schema_notes: power = aggregate damage output per action. magazine_depth = total attack actions before reload. move cost for CYBER units represents compute/analyst resource burn, never zero.

maneuver.terrain_constraints: Requires AIRFIELD or CARRIER node at start and end. Cannot occupy LAND or SEA nodes.
Requires AIRFIELD node at start and end.
Requires AIRFIELD node at start and end.
Requires FARP or AIRFIELD for rearm. Cannot cross open ocean. Short-range rotary.
One-way attack profile. Launched from LAND node. No return or recovery.
All LAND nodes. Air insert capable with TRANSPORT asset.
All LAND nodes. Excels in urban and mountainous terrain.
LAND and LITTORAL nodes. Requires MARITIME_CARGO for open ocean transit.
All LAND nodes. Air insert via TRANSPORT asset.
LAND and LITTORAL nodes. Amphibious assault capable with ARG.
All LAND nodes. Severe penalty in SWAMP/JUNGLE. Requires TRANSPORT for strategic deployment.
All LAND nodes. Optimized for open steppe and plains.
All LAND nodes.
All LAND nodes. Excels in mixed and urban terrain.
All LAND nodes. Degraded performance in mountainous terrain.
Requires AIRFIELD at origin and destination. No combat node entry without escort.
Requires FARP or FOB within operational radius. Can land any clear terrain.
Requires AIRFIELD at origin and destination.
SEA and LITTORAL nodes only. Requires PORT to load and offload.
SEA and LITTORAL nodes. Beach landing capable — no PORT required.
LAND nodes only. Requires open terrain for radar. Requires TRANSPORT for strategic deployment.
LAND nodes only. Requires 1 turn setup after movement.
LAND nodes only. Requires 1 turn setup after movement.
LAND nodes only. Requires 1 turn setup after movement.
LAND nodes only. Requires 2 turns setup after movement.
SEA and LITTORAL nodes. Underway replenishment capable — no PORT required.
SEA nodes only. Requires PORT to load and offload. Cannot beach land.
SEA and LITTORAL. Beach landing capable.
SEA and LITTORAL. Helo deck enables air insert of carried light forces.
SEA and LITTORAL. Operates in shallow coastal waters denied to larger vessels.
SEA and LITTORAL nodes only.
SUBSURFACE and deep SEA nodes. Cannot enter LITTORAL shallows. Requires PORT for reload.
SEA and LITTORAL nodes.
SUBSURFACE and SEA nodes. Requires PORT for reload.
SEA and LITTORAL. Excels in strait and chokepoint denial. Cannot operate in high sea state.
All LAND nodes including denied areas. Air insert with TRANSPORT.
No physical node. Operates across all networked nodes globally. Requires COMMS infrastructure.
All LAND nodes. Deep penetration capable. Air insert via VDV/IL-76.
No physical node. Global reach via network infrastructure.
All LAND nodes including enemy-controlled. Clandestine movement.
All LAND nodes. Wheeled — high road mobility. Shoot and displace doctrine.
All LAND nodes except SWAMP/JUNGLE. Tracked.
All LAND nodes. Wheeled — road-mobile. Hide and displace doctrine.
All LAND nodes. Wheeled — road-mobile.
All LAND nodes. Road-mobile from prepared and concealed positions.
URBAN and CITY nodes only. Cannot operate in open terrain — immediately detectable.

special_effect.description: Enemy units occupying same node pay +25% upkeep per turn — harassment, sabotage, intelligence denial.

maneuver.terrain_constraints: Any LAND node. Emplaced — does not move once deployed. Covert placement.

special_effect.description: Enemy units moving through this node have speed reduced by 50% for 2 turns — attrition and delay without direct engagement.

maneuver.terrain_constraints: All LAND nodes. Low mobility — suited to holding terrain not maneuver.

special_effect.description: Holding a node with this unit increases enemy recon and attack costs in that node by +15% — terrain denial through presence.

maneuver.terrain_constraints: All LAND nodes. Prioritizes TRANSPORT, PORT, and AIRFIELD nodes for operations.

special_effect.description: Attacks TRANSPORT and SUSTAINMENT nodes — raises reload and move costs for all units using that node by +30% for 2 turns.

maneuver.terrain_constraints: MOUNTAIN, JUNGLE, DESERT, and RURAL nodes only. Deep local terrain knowledge.

special_effect.description: Passive INTEL_REVEAL — exposes enemy unit positions in adjacent nodes each turn without requiring a recon action. Faction-assignable at scenario setup.
